Composite TOP

From Derivative
Jump to navigation

The Composite TOP combines two or more texture inputs using blend operations.

Contents

  • Parameters

Summary[edit]

The Composite TOP is a multi-input TOP that will perform a composite operation for each input.

Parameters

Operand - Blend mode: Over, Under, Add, Subtract, Multiply, Screen.

Opacity - Master opacity (0-1).

Pre Fit - How to handle resolution mismatches.

Inputs

Accepts multiple TOP inputs.
